(III) rate $=\frac{k[X]}{X_{s}+[X]}$

where initial concentrations of $\mathrm{X}$ are much higher than $X_{s}$		 (R)
(IV) rate $=\frac{k[X]^{2}}{X_{s}+[X]}$

where initial concentration of $X$ is

much higher than $\mathrm{X}_{\mathrm{s}}$		 (S)
(T)
options: (C) $\mathrm{I} \rightarrow \mathrm{P}$; II $\rightarrow$ Q; III $\rightarrow$ Q; IV $\rightarrow$ R
